title: Management Summary — Architecture Assessment fragment
description: Structured data for `### Architecture Assessment`. The renderer emits a 3-column Defect/Description/Key Findings table. The prose intro + closing link to §7 are fixed by the template — the LLM only supplies the verdict sentence + defect rows.

verdict_severity.description: Drives the leading emoji for the architecture verdict sentence.

verdict_prose.description: Architecture-level verdict sentence(s). Begins with a bold phrase like '**Verdict — …**'. The renderer prepends the severity emoji.

framing.description: Short framing sentence introducing the defects table (e.g. 'Four cross-cutting defects drive ~40% of all findings:').

defects.description: Cross-cutting architectural defects. Rendered as 3-column table rows.

name.description: Short bold defect name, e.g. 'Secrets in source code'.

description.description: One-sentence description of the structural weakness.

findings.description:
Linked findings. Each item is {ref, label}; renderer emits '[ref](#anchor) — label' with
between rows.

closing_ref_anchor.description: Anchor target for the 'See §7' closing line. Defaults to §7.
